description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week Ethan Qiu logged 30 hrs 45 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 2 hrs 48 mins. His tracked work was split across 6 projects, and his most used languages were Other, Java, and Markdown. There were no GitHub commits, opened pull requests, or new repositories recorded this week.
